north_star.definition: owner-proven control of a non-SaSame endpoint

not_tracked_yet._note: No reliable cost-zero detector yet; reported as null rather than faked.

framing: World's largest *claimable* Agent Passport Registry is the aim. We do NOT claim 'world's largest' yet (unproven). We do NOT chase raw passport count (count-first deferred until the claim gate is proven). The honest headline is external_claims.

notable_events.note: First external tools/call observed (get_pricing, then chain_list). Empty args, single one-off session, no other surfaces touched, no downstream claim or intake. Classified as a LOOK, not demand. Does not meet the build-freeze 'real args' unfreeze bar; observation phase continues.
